currentObjective: Implement U4-DIAGNOSTIC-UI: a child diagnostic page backed by the existing /api/diagnostic and /api/diagnostic/submit contract.

product.problemStatement: Parents can start a diagnostic from the dashboard, but there was no dedicated child-facing diagnostic page. The API existed, the dashboard badge linked nowhere useful, and there was no guided 5-question flow to calibrate the starting maths level.
product.user: Parent or child opening the diagnostic from the dashboard to set the correct starting learning level.
useCases: Parent clicks Diagnostic pending on the dashboard and lands on a focused 5-question maths diagnostic page
Child answers 5 questions one by one and submits them at the end
If the child already completed the diagnostic, the page shows their calibrated difficulty and next learning link
After completion, the child can jump straight into the next 20-question learning set
nfrs: Use the existing diagnostic API contract with no backend changes
Keep the flow mobile-friendly and simple enough for a child to use
Fail safely back to the dashboard if the child or session is missing
Keep the UI accessible and readable on small screens
acceptanceCriteria: 5 diagnostic questions are shown one at a time
POST /api/diagnostic/submit is called with childId and 5 answers
If diagnostic is complete already, the page shows the completed state
Dashboard diagnostic badge can route into the page
antiScope: Do NOT change the diagnostic API contract
Do NOT add new database tables
Do NOT build the other U1/U2/U3/U5 workstreams in this branch

codexTasks: Create app/diagnostic/page.tsx with a 5-question guided flow
Handle the already-completed state and expose the next learning link
Keep the UI compatible with the existing diagnostic API shapes
claudeTasks: Test the diagnostic page end to end
Verify GET and POST contract expectations match the UI
Check that dashboard badge navigation reaches the new page

mergePolicy: No merge without explicit user approval.

workstreams.goal: Implement the repo-native coordination layer and dashboard tabs foundation.
chunks: Add tab routing and section state
Split dashboard into Students, Progress, Rewards, and Account sections
Add diagnostic badges and preserve existing actions
Smoke test and hand off to Claude

workstreams.goal: Build a dedicated diagnostic page for the existing diagnostic API and connect the dashboard badge into it.
chunks: Submit 5 answers to the existing diagnostic endpoint
Hand off to Claude for test coverage

coordinationRules: Read the shared task, ownership, status, handoff, and message files before starting new work.
Poll the other agent every 5 seconds while actively working.
Update your own status every 30-60 seconds and on every blocker change.
Keep write scopes disjoint unless the task explicitly says otherwise.
Product owns requirements quality, use cases, and non-functional expectations before implementation starts.
